resources.string: Your saved places, invitations, and services will appear here once you begin exploring Kaze.
When a hotel, venue, or host invites you, your passes and event details will appear here.
When you accept an invitation or join a conference, the agenda, rooms, and venue guidance will appear here.
Choose another day or check back when the organizer publishes the agenda.
Some Kaze features still work offline. We need internet only for live updates, login, payments, and fresh event data.
Everything is confirmed. You can return home or keep exploring your Kaze experience.
Kaze uses the camera only when you scan QR codes, tickets, or venue access passes. You stay in control.
Location helps Kaze show nearby venues, routes, and event guidance when you ask for them.
Tiny screens carry trust. These deserve the same care as the homepage.
